positive: A mystical, stylized mountain range at twilight, viewed from a central, elevated perspective. The peaks are rendered with sharp, clean linework and geometric abstraction, suggesting monumental scale. The scene is set against a deep indigo night sky filled with stylized crescent moons, glowing abstract celestial flora, and subtle cosmic dust clouds. Focus on strong, high-contrast silhouettes and defined edges. The overall aesthetic must be sophisticated vector illustration, highly graphic, and symmetrical, perfect for a large-format apparel print. Limited color palette of deep teal, cobalt blue, and metallic gold accents. Central composition, clean lines, high saturation.
